summary: Validated Option C Ecosystem-Globe redesign end-to-end. Backend: 26/26 pytest PASS (24 previous + 2 new: test_attack_path_ecosystem_payload asserts continents[7 in LAYER_ORDER with Polygon geometry], layer_stats[7 with count>=1 each], points.layer/layer_label/color, paths.layers_traversed, steps.layer/layer_label/layer_color; test_attack_path_stream_mentions_layer asserts SSE stream contains ecosystem layer names and terminates with done+route). All 7 layer keys present (endpoint,saas,cloud,dev,code,onprem,edge) and every layer has count>=1 (endpoint=4, saas=1, cloud=7, dev=5, code=1, onprem=16, edge=1) — dogfood seed enrichment confirmed. /api/health and /api/readiness still 200. Frontend Attack Path tab: 3D dark ecosystem globe renders (data-testid=attack-globe), 7 distinct colored continents visible in screenshot (orange=Endpoints top-left, purple=SaaS top-right, blue=Cloud center, cyan=Dev, lime=Code lower-right, orange=OnPrem, green=Edge), Ecosystem Layers legend renders (data-testid=layer-legend) with all 7 layer-{key} buttons showing counts+risk bars+top asset. Hovering layer-cloud dims the other continents and pans camera — screenshot confirms cloud continent highlighted while others dimmed. Play Breach progresses HOP 1/3 → 2/3 → 3/3, each hop shows layer badge (data-testid=layer-badge-{layer}); 13 badges rendered across the 4 path cards. PathCards show layers_traversed sequence (e.g. 'saas → onprem → onprem'). Regression: engagement page 9 tabs, kill switch button, role switcher intact.
critical_code_review_comments: attack_path.py cleanly separates LAYERS config, _classify_layer heuristics, and compute() — well structured.
Layer classification is heuristic and product-string based; may misclassify future assets — acceptable for v1 with the explicit tag/exposure fallbacks.
compute() runs 3 sequential Mongo queries + several O(assets) loops; fine at seed scale (~35 assets).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ecosystem-globe redesign is fully working. Backend attack-path payload contract: continents (7 GeoJSON polygons in LAYER_ORDER endpoint,saas,cloud,dev,code,onprem,edge), layer_stats (7 with count/risk/top), points[i] carry layer+layer_label+color, paths[i] carry layers_traversed, steps[j] carry layer+layer_label+layer_color. Frontend uses data-testids: tab-attackpath, attack-globe, layer-legend, layer-{key}, play-path-{id}, layer-badge-{layer}. Benign WebGL 'GPU stall' warnings — ignore.
